should_fire.prompt: My detector already passes its eval. Export it and make a local runnable package.
Connect our working OCR model to the application and document the integration handoff.
The tracker works on our test clips. Put it in production on the RTSP camera.
What do I do after the model works? I need monitoring and rollback guidance.
Deploy the evaluated model to our managed device after showing the handoff checks.

should_not_fire.prompt: Build a detector for damaged cardboard boxes from these sample images.
How much will five camera streams cost per month?
Which exact Roboflow API field selects this model ID?
Segment these tumor images and determine whether a model can meet 90 percent IoU.
I only have existing masks; calculate their pixel areas locally.
